name: West African Inspired One Pot Chicken and Rice
description: This recipe features bone-in chicken thighs and parboiled rice cooked in a rich, flavorful sauce with peanut butter and a blend of spices. It's a hearty one-pot meal with West African influences.
keywords: West African, chicken, rice, one pot, peanut butter, jollof

recipeInstructions.text: Season chicken with 1 tbsp each salt, thyme, curry powder & paprika. Brown in palm oil. Remove.

In the same pot: sauté onion, then fry tomato paste, then add blended pepper mix (red bell pepper, tomatoes, scotch bonnet, and blended garlic cloves). Reduce by half. Season again with 1 tbsp each thyme, curry & paprika.
Whisk peanut butter with warm water or stock until smooth. Stir into sauce.
Add rice, return chicken, pour in stock (liquid slightly above rice). Cover and cook on low for 30–35 minutes. Optional: add foil under the lid for a smoky Jollof Rice bottom flavor.
Add spinach, steam for 5 minutes. Rest for 10 minutes. Fluff & serve.
